SEARCH
Package com.stevenlagoy.presidency.characters

Class CharacterManager

java.lang.Object
com.stevenlagoy.presidency.core.Manager
com.stevenlagoy.presidency.characters.CharacterManager
All Implemented Interfaces:
Jsonic<Manager>, Repr<Manager>
public final class CharacterManager extends Manager
CharacterManager manages the generation, access, control, and interaction of Character classes (including the Player).

This class is final and has no instance variables, and is not designed to be instantiated.

    • generateCharacterModel

      public CharacterModel generateCharacterModel(Demographics demographics, LocalDate birthdate)
      Generates a character model based on the demographics and birthdate of a person. Incorporates some randomness.
      Parameters:
      demographics - The demographics of the person.
      birthdate - The date of birth of the person.
      Returns:
      A character model which looks like a person with the demographics and age.
      See Also:
      • generateCharacterModel(Demographics, int)

    • generateCharacterModel

      public CharacterModel generateCharacterModel(Demographics demographics, int age)
      Generates a character model based on the demographics and age of a person. Incorporates some randomness.
      Parameters:
      demographics - The demographics of the person.
      age - The age in years of the person.
      Returns:
      A character model which looks like a person with the demographics and age.

      public Manager fromJson(core.JSONObject json)

      Interpret a JSONObject into an object of this type.
